tagline: A mountain recreation area in the foothills of Almaty

footer.about: Tau-Turan Resort is a year-round mountain recreation area in the foothills of Almaty: family getaways, corporate events, team-building and celebrations.
footer.campText: Tau-Turan Kids Camp is a separate project on the same location.
footer.address: Almaty region, Talgar district, Besagash village, Tau-Turan mountain area

home.title: Tau-Turan Resort — mountain getaways, team-building & events near Almaty
home.description: Tau-Turan Resort is a premium mountain recreation area in the foothills of Almaty: family getaways, corporate retreats, team-building and celebrations, year-round.

hero.h1: Mountains, fresh air and quiet — minutes from the city
hero.lead: Chalets and cottages, a banquet hall and open-air activity grounds — Tau-Turan Resort welcomes families, companies and large events all year round.

segments.title: A getaway that fits your plan
segments.subtitle: Four formats — one address in the Almaty foothills

items.title: Family weekend getaways
items.text: Chalets and cottages at the foot of the mountains, a pool, a bathhouse and fresh air instead of city noise.
items.label: View rooms

items.title: Corporate retreats
items.text: Seminar halls, catering and group accommodation for teams of any size.
items.label: For business

items.title: Team-building
items.text: Outdoor activity programs run by certified instructors with full technical support.
items.label: Team-building programs

items.title: Celebrations & events
items.text: Birthdays, anniversaries and weddings surrounded by mountains — banquet hall or terrace, your choice.
items.label: Book a date

testimonialsTeaser.title: What guests say
testimonialsTeaser.subtitle: Written, audio and video testimonials — the full list is in the Gallery section

items.name: Aigerim S.
items.text: We came for the weekend as a family — the kids loved the pool, and we finally exhaled thanks to the quiet and fresh air.

items.name: Marat B.
items.text: We organized team-building for 40 people. Everything was on point: transfer, sound, activity grounds. We'll be back.

items.name: Dinara K.
items.text: We hosted a wedding on the terrace overlooking the mountains — guests still talk about that view.

finalCta.title: Ready to book your visit?
finalCta.text: Leave a request — our manager will reach out on WhatsApp within 15 minutes.

rooms.title: Rooms & Rates — Tau-Turan Resort
rooms.description: Chalets, family cottages and guesthouse rooms at Tau-Turan Resort. Seasonal rates, capacity and infrastructure.

hero.lead: From a cosy room for two to a private chalet for the whole family — choose the format that fits your stay.

items.name: Chalet
items.desc: A private house with a terrace and mountain views, fully equipped kitchen.

items.name: Family cottage
items.desc: Two floors, several bedrooms, a living room and a barbecue area — for large families and groups.

items.name: Guesthouse room
items.desc: A compact, cosy room in the main building, close to the pool and banquet hall.

cta.title: Not sure which format fits?
cta.text: Our manager will help you pick accommodation based on dates and guest count.
cta.label: Message on WhatsApp

business.title: For Business — team-building & corporate events | Tau-Turan Resort
business.description: A team-building and corporate events venue near Almaty: halls, catering, outdoor activities, transfer.

hero.lead: Seminar halls, catering, professional sound and outdoor activities — for teams from 10 to 200+ people.

items.title: Seminar halls
items.text: Equipped spaces for conferences and strategy sessions.

items.title: Catering
items.text: Banquet and buffet menus tailored to your event format.

items.title: Sound & lighting
items.text: Professional technical equipment for presentations and ceremonies.

items.title: Outdoor activities
items.text: Team-building programs run by certified instructors.

items.title: Group accommodation
items.text: Simultaneous housing for large teams across chalets and cottages.

items.title: Transfer
items.text: Organized transport for groups to and from Almaty.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Video, audio, written and 2GIS reviews — real guest impressions

written.name: Yerzhan A.
written.text: The best place to escape the city, just an hour away. The kids still ask to go back.

written.name: Gulnara R.
written.text: Great activity organization, everyone was happy with the program.

written.name: Timur Zh.
written.text: The banquet hall and the mountain view created exactly the atmosphere we wanted.

written.name: Assel N.
written.text: The bathhouse after an active day was exactly what we needed. We'll definitely be back in winter.

geo.name: 2GIS review
geo.text: A wonderful place for a family getaway, the staff is very attentive.

geo.name: 2GIS review
geo.text: We held a corporate event here — the organization was excellent.

map.title: How to get there
map.text: Almaty region, Talgar district, Besagash village, Tau-Turan mountain area — about an hour's drive from central Almaty via the Kuldzha tract.
